title: Update Waste Stream Profile
description: A process change will introduce a new component into a waste stream. The EHS specialist must update the waste profile.

tasks.description: Retrieve the existing waste stream profile.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent pulls up the current profile, showing its composition and waste codes.

tasks.description: Add the new component to the profile and re-evaluate the waste characteristics.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent adds the new component, which now makes the waste stream hazardous.

tasks.description: Assign the new, correct EPA waste code to the profile and notify the plant of the change in handling requirements.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent updates the waste code and sends a notification about the change.
